title: coniogramme fraxinea
intro: Coniogramme fraxinea, also known as the fern-leaf coniogramme, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Asteraceae, characterized by its fern-like leaves and small, yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Coniogramme fraxinea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Coniogramme fraxinea is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
